queue_item.action: Require reusable research claims to declare lifecycle, revalidation, and falsification metadata before downstream acceptance.

progress.finding: A claim should fail closed when it is structurally incomplete, superseded, future-dated, expired under its declared revalidation policy, or missing an explicit falsification route; provenance and schema validity remain separate from truth.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent committed source.

queue_item.handoff: Continuity Mining should integrate this gate into effective-queue evidence consumption; Cloudflare Research should apply it to medicine-facing and theory evidence packets; Vercel Studio should use it for runtime claims whose validity can expire after browser or deployment changes.

state_update_policy: append_only; does not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json or another team's records
